title: SquidCraft
body:
This mod makes squids useful.

# 0.14.0 Major Update

0.14.0 is a major update, which is rewritten.

The things added is listed this below:

- Shredded squid
- Cooked shredded squid
- Glow shredded squid
- Magma shredded squid
- Block of cooked shredded squid

For more infomation, please check the source on [GitHub](https://github.com/XenFork/SquidCraft).
